required_skills: Strategic Product Vision and Multi-Quarter Roadmap Ownership
Senior Stakeholder Management including C-Suite Communication
Advanced Data Analysis and Metrics-Based Product Decisions
Cross-functional Team Leadership and Influence without Authority
Business Case Development and ROI Analysis
Agile and Lean Product Development Methodologies
Mentorship and Coaching of Junior Product Managers
preferred_skills: P&L ownership or revenue accountability experience
Experience scaling products from 0-to-1 or through hypergrowth
Enterprise or B2B SaaS product experience
International product localization and global market expansion
Experience navigating regulatory or compliance requirements in product design
responsibilities: Define and own a multi-quarter product strategy and roadmap that directly aligns with company revenue goals and long-term vision
Lead cross-functional product squads of engineers, designers, data scientists, and marketers to ship high-impact product initiatives on time
Develop and present executive-level product briefs, business cases, and investment pitches to VP and C-suite stakeholders
Drive customer segmentation, persona development, and Jobs-to-Be-Done analysis to surface unmet needs and prioritize high-value product bets
Establish and own the North Star metric framework, defining success metrics and leading indicators for each major product area
Design and oversee a systematic experimentation program including A/B tests, multivariate tests, and holdout groups to de-risk product decisions
Conduct deep competitive intelligence analysis and identify market positioning strategies to differentiate the product and capture market share
Partner with sales, marketing, and customer success to build integrated go-to-market strategies for major product launches and feature expansions
Mentor and coach associate and mid-level product managers, conducting roadmap reviews, providing structured feedback, and raising overall PM team quality
Identify and resolve complex cross-team dependencies, technical constraints, and organizational blockers that impede product delivery and velocity
